tagline: Insurance That Puts Your Interests First. Always.
hero_subtitle: Independent insurance agency in Oak Brook, IL since 1991. Unparalleled service and competitive quotes for auto, home, business, life, and health insurance across Illinois, Wisconsin, and Indiana.
address: 1000 Jorie Blvd. Suite 109, Oak Brook, IL 60523
service_area_description: Serving Oak Brook, Elmhurst, Downers Grove, Lombard & clients across Illinois, Wisconsin, and Indiana.
seo_title: KSD Insurance | Auto, Home & Business Insurance in Oak Brook, IL
seo_description: KSD Insurance Agency in Oak Brook, IL. Independent broker since 1991. Best coverage and lowest rates for auto, home, business, life, and health insurance.
services_subtitle: Independent agency representing multiple carriers to find you the best coverage at the lowest rate.
reviews_subtitle: Same representatives, same integrity, same commitment — since day one.
cta_heading: You deserve insurance that works for you.
cta_subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation quote. We'll compare carriers and find you the best coverage at the best price.
footer_description: Independent insurance agency since 1991. Certified Trusted Choice member. Auto, home, business, life, and health insurance across IL, WI, and IN.

services_featured.name: Business Insurance
services_featured.description: Customized commercial coverage for startups to multi-location operations. General liability, property, workers comp, and professional liability.

services_secondary.name: Home & Auto Insurance
services_secondary.description: Protect your biggest assets with the right coverage at the right price. We shop multiple carriers so you don't have to.

services_accent.name: Life & Health Insurance
services_accent.description: Protect your family's future and your health. We help determine the right type and amount of coverage for your situation.

services_wide.name: Umbrella & Specialty Coverage
services_wide.description: Extra liability protection beyond standard policies. Umbrella, disability, and group coverage for individuals and businesses.

about_features.title: Kevin Dougherty, Principal
about_features.description: Founded KSD in 1991 with the belief that insurance should be a social service, not a sales operation. Same representative for 33+ years.

about_features.title: Marcella Grunert, Broker
about_features.description: Co-founder and insurance broker. Dedicated to finding the right coverage for every client with honesty and integrity.

about_features.title: Trusted Choice Certified
about_features.description: Certified member of the Trusted Choice network — independent agents committed to putting policyholders first.

reviews.name: Business Owner
reviews.text: Kevin has handled our business insurance for over 20 years. He always finds us better coverage at lower rates than the big national agencies.

reviews.name: Homeowner
reviews.text: When we had a claim, KSD handled everything. They advocated for us with the carrier and got us a fair settlement fast.

reviews.name: Long-Time Client
reviews.text: I've been with KSD since the 90s. Same people, same integrity. You always talk to Kevin or Marcella — never a call center.
